description_long: This object consists of a camouflaged display stand holding two AK-style rifles with wooden stocks and foregrips, black metal receivers, and curved magazines. The rifles are mounted horizontally, one above the other, with additional magazines and a small booklet or manual placed on the lower shelf. The display stand features a digital woodland camouflage pattern and a solid black base, giving it a military or tactical appearance. The rifles have prominent iron sights, standard-length barrels, and classic AK-pattern features such as gas tubes and charging handles. The wood components are a reddish-brown color, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall presentation suggests a secure, organized display for firearms, suitable for an armory, gun shop, or training facility.
description: A camouflaged display stand holds two AK-style rifles with wooden stocks and black metal receivers, accompanied by extra magazines and a booklet. The setup is organized and visually striking, with a military or tactical theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing both AK-style rifles mounted on a camouflaged stand, with extra magazines and a booklet visible below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the stand and the rifles' alignment, with the magazines and booklet seen from the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the camouflaged back panel of the stand, with no rifles or accessories visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifles' barrels and stocks in profile, as well as the magazines and booklet from the other edge.
